title: Watching Short Videos 看短视频
scene: 两个朋友一起看短视频并讨论

lines.speaker: Friend A
lines.line: Have you seen this funny cat video? It has ten million views!
lines.trans: 你看过这个搞笑的猫咪视频吗？有一千万播放量！

lines.speaker: Friend B
lines.line: Oh my gosh, the cat is dancing to the music. That is hilarious.
lines.trans: 天哪，这只猫跟着音乐跳舞。太好笑了。

lines.speaker: Friend A
lines.line: I can watch short videos for hours. This app knows exactly what I like.
lines.trans: 我可以看短视频看好几个小时。这个APP太懂我喜欢什么了。

lines.speaker: Friend B
lines.line: The algorithm is scary. One minute I am watching cooking, then it shows me travel videos.
lines.trans: 算法太可怕了。前一分钟我还在看烹饪，然后它就给我推旅行视频。

lines.speaker: Friend A
lines.line: I know, right? I just spent fifty minutes on this app and did not even notice.
lines.trans: 是吧？我刚在这个APP上花了五十分钟，都没意识到。

lines.speaker: Friend B
lines.line: We should set a timer. Too much screen time is bad for our eyes.
lines.trans: 我们应该设个定时。看太久屏幕对眼睛不好。

lines.speaker: Friend A
lines.line: Good idea. Let me watch this last one, then we will stop.
lines.trans: 好主意。让我再看最后一个，然后我们就停下来。

lines.speaker: Friend B
lines.line: That is what you always say. Two hours later, you are still scrolling.
lines.trans: 你总是这么说。两小时后，你还在刷。

lines.speaker: Friend A
lines.line: Okay, okay, I will close the app now. Let us go for a walk instead.
lines.trans: 好了好了，我现在就关掉APP。我们去散步吧。
